[WhenUse] Coin Power +1 for every 5 ([Laceration] + [Burst]) on target (max 3)
[WinDuel] Inflict +1 [Burst] Count, inflict 2 [DefenseDown]
skills.name: Nothing But a Meaningless Struggle...!

passives.desc: When this unit is present, Jia Mu gains 200 Shield for her Core and every Part
passives.name: Witness Me, O Revered Xianren!

passives.desc:
As long as this unit is present, apply the following effects to the caged unit:
- Become 'immobilized'
- This unit's buffs, HP, and SP cannot be changed
passives.name: Duties of the Precious Jade

passives.desc: When this unit is defeated, return the caged character to the battle next turn
passives.name: Departure

passives.desc:
If this unit is defeated by the Sinners, activate the following effects:
- All allies heal 10 SP; all allies gain 2 [AttackDmgUp] next turn
- Inflict 5 [Binding], 3 [AttackDown], and 5 [Vulnerable] against Jia Mu for the next 2 turns
- The unit that was caged in this unit heals up to 45 SP. Gain 2 [Enhancement] upon its return
- Gain 3 E.G.O Resources to all Affinities
passives.name: Refute the Evil; Restore Justice [破邪顯正]

skills.desc:
[CanDuelGuard]
[WinDuel] Jia Mu heals 15 SP. At 0 SP, heal 30 SP instead.
skills.name: I'll be docile

descs: [OnSucceedAttack] Raise Stagger Threshold by 50% of damage dealt

skills.desc:
[CantDuel]
[EndSkill] Kills this unit and heals Jia Mu's SP up to 45 SP. Apply 2 [Enhancement] and 5 [AttackDmgUp] to Jia Mu next turn
skills.name: I'll be your amusement

passives.desc: Has the [SupremeEternalLife] effect
passives.name: O The Supreme Xianren of Immortality

passives.desc:
HP does not drop below 1

At 1 HP, replace [SupremeEternalLife] with [ImperfectEternalLife]
passives.name: Let us be eternally free from aging and death

passives.desc: If this unit's HP drops to 1 upon getting hit, heal 10 SP to the Sinner who attacked this unit; then, gain 3 random E.G.O Resources for the least-owned Sin Affinities (activates once for this unit)
passives.name: Knowledge of Immortality
